item.title: Paper submitted to IEEE SLT 2026
item.description: The preprint of the work is available at

item.title: Unmixing The Crowd: Learning Persistent Speaker Representations from Mixture-Derived Multi-Speaker Embeddings
Sona: Real-Time Multi-Target Sound Attenuation for Noise Sensitivity
Accepted an offer to Intern at Skyworks
item.description: Excited to share that I have accepted an offer to intern at Skyworks AIS team to spearhead speech enhancement research. I’ll be starting on May 27, 2025.

item.title: 🎧 aTENNuate submitted to Interspeech 2025
item.description: I am thrilled to share one of the projects I had the privilege of working on during my time at BrainChip - aTENNuate. This highly performant model represents a breakthrough in real-time speech enhancement, working directly on raw waveforms with lightning-fast speed. You can learn more about aTENNuate and explore the paper here

item.title: aTENNuate
item.description: Developed a Deep SSM for real-time audio denoising for edge AI applications.

item.title: Odessa a speaker dependent ASR using HMM
item.description: This is a basic HMM-based ASR that uses MFCC and delta features to identify six phrases: “Odessa” (a keyword phrase), “Play music,” “Start music,” “Turn off the lights,” “Turn on the lights,” and “What time is it.”

item.title: Real-time Speech Enhancement on Raw Signals with Deep State-space Modeling
The DISPLACE challenge 2023-diarization of speaker and language in conversational environments
